documentation_impact.rationale: This ship-stage pass emits governance-facing documentation artifacts for Phase 4 ratification, including the feature delivery report mirror in inbox/out and the policy-compliance gate artifact.

policy_alignment.agents_md_alignment: Ship-stage execution stayed at the human gate: no tess advance, no commit, no push, and required validation plus policy artifact generation were completed locally.
policy_alignment.constitution_alignment: Documentation and reference stewardship obligations were satisfied by recording validation outcomes and staging the required delivery-report surface for operator review.
policy_alignment.prd_alignment: Phase-4 ship evidence remains tied to human approval and intervention observability, with run-log-linked pause/resume/abort proof and review_passes=true preserved in delivery artifacts.
